persimmon-wash.$description: Persimmon Wash — Hero full-bleed section background — warm terracotta field that carries the massive name lockup

blush-linen.$description: Blush Linen — Section background, split-screen left or right panel — dusty rose that softens adjacent fields

candlelight.$description: Candlelight — Section background, split-screen panel — off-white cream that recedes behind type

sage-whisper.$description: Sage Whisper — Accent full-bleed background for occasional sections — desaturated eucalyptus that cools the warm system

inkwell-blue.$description: Inkwell Blue — Solid circle action button, link underlines and text — the only dark saturated mark against the chalky fields, dense and editorial

slate-moss.$description: Slate Moss — Alternate muted button or surface fill — warm-leaning gray-green for secondary controls

fossil.$description: Fossil — Muted section background, quiet tonal step between cream and white

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — All typography, hairline borders, icon strokes, arrow marks — the sole ink color across every surface

paper.$description: Paper — Canvas background, inverse text on dark button, rotated Contact badge fill

mlrstandard.$description: Sole typeface for all text — 331px for the hero name with lineHeight 0.80 and -0.02em tracking, 32px for section labels at lineHeight 1.20, 16px for pagination and UI chrome at lineHeight 1.30 with +0.01em to +0.02em tracking. The custom face has near-zero terminals and uniform stroke weight that holds up at 331px without distortion — a system font would look brittle at that size.

apple-system.$description: Ultralight fallback reserved only for the secondary button label — used at 32px weight 200 to contrast with MlrStandard's heavier editorial presence

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Default page background and split-screen right panel

candlelight.$description: Surface level 1: Soft cream section — sits one step above white

blush-linen.$description: Surface level 2: Dusty rose section — introduces warmth without saturating

sage-whisper.$description: Surface level 3: Cool green section — palette counterweight

persimmon.$description: Surface level 4: Hero color field — maximum warmth, carries the masthead
